subcodes.first_line: O thou pure leaf, speaking in remembrance of God! That which issued from the spiritual throat of that bird of the garden of attraction [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها الورقه الطیبه الناطقه بذکر الله آنچه از حنجره روحانی ان طیر گلشن انجذاب
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @praise and encouragement, @martyrs and martyrdom
